All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

A

addCell(Position, DiseaseState) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Creates a new Person with the given initial state and places it on the grid at the specified position.
addListener(SimulationListener) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Registers a listener that will be notified at every tick and on every reset.

C

CliRunner - Class in com.cellsimulation.cli
Interactive command-line driver for the simulation engine.
CliRunner() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.cli.CliRunner
Builds a new CLI runner wired to a default engine: a 20x20 bounded grid, the default SimulationSettings and the orthogonal neighborhood strategy.
com.cellsimulation.app - package com.cellsimulation.app
Application entry point and JavaFX user interface layer.
com.cellsimulation.cli - package com.cellsimulation.cli
Command-line front-end of the simulation.
com.cellsimulation.io - package com.cellsimulation.io
Persistence layer: save and load simulation state to and from disk.
com.cellsimulation.model - package com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.
com.cellsimulation.neighborhood - package com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Strategy implementations for cell neighborhood computation.
com.cellsimulation.stats - package com.cellsimulation.stats
Live statistics collection and history.

D

DECEASED - Enum constant in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
 
DiseaseState - Enum Class in com.cellsimulation.model
Health state of a Person in the disease-propagation model (a simple SIR variant extended with a terminal DECEASED state).

E

equals(Object) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Indicates whether another object is a Position with the same row and column as this one.
EuclideanNeighborhood - Class in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Disc-shaped implementation of NeighborhoodStrategy using the Euclidean distance.
EuclideanNeighborhood(int) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.EuclideanNeighborhood
Creates a new Euclidean neighborhood with the given radius.

G

getAverageInfectionDays() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the average number of infection days among the persons that are currently infected.
getCell(Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Returns the person occupying the given position, or null if the cell is empty.
getColumn() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Returns the column of this position on the grid.
getCount(DiseaseState) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the number of persons in the given state at the time of the snapshot.
getCountByState() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the full count-by-state map.
getDistance() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.ManhattanNeighborhood
 
getEmptyNeighbors(Position, NeighborhoodStrategy) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Returns the empty cells among the neighbors of the given position, according to the supplied strategy.
getGrid() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
 
getHeight() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
 
getHistory() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.StatisticsService
Returns the full history of snapshots, oldest first.
getImmunityFactor() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
getImmunityVariance() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getInfectionDays() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
getInfectionDaysHistogram() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the distribution of infection durations among the infected persons: each key is a number of infection days and the associated value is how many infected persons have been sick for exactly that many days.
getLatest() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.StatisticsService
Returns the most recent snapshot, or null if the history is empty (typically because no tick has been played yet, or because the service has just been reset).
getMaxImmunity() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the highest immunity factor found among the living persons (every state except DECEASED).
getMaxInfectionDays() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getMeanImmunity() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getMinImmunity() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Returns the lowest immunity factor found among the living persons (every state except DECEASED).
getMobilityRate() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getMortalityProbability() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getName() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.EuclideanNeighborhood
 
getName() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.ManhattanNeighborhood
 
getName() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.MooreNeighborhood
 
getName() - Method in interface com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.NeighborhoodStrategy
Returns the human-readable name of this strategy, suitable for display in the UI selector.
getName() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.OrthogonalNeighborhood
 
getNeighborhood() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
 
getNeighbors(Grid, Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.EuclideanNeighborhood
Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Euclidean radius.
getNeighbors(Grid, Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.ManhattanNeighborhood
Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Manhattan distance.
getNeighbors(Grid, Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.MooreNeighborhood
Returns the eight Moore neighbors of the given position.
getNeighbors(Grid, Position) - Method in interface com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.NeighborhoodStrategy
Returns the positions of the neighbors of the given position on the provided grid, according to this strategy.
getNeighbors(Grid, Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.OrthogonalNeighborhood
Returns the four orthogonal neighbors of the given position.
getPosition() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
getRadius() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.EuclideanNeighborhood
 
getRecoveryProbability() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getRow() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Returns the row of this position on the grid.
getSettings() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
 
getSimulationSpeed() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getState() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
getTick() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
 
getTickCount() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
 
getTotalPopulation() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
 
getTransmissionProbability() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getVaccineEfficacy() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
 
getWidth() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
 
Grid - Class in com.cellsimulation.model
Two-dimensional playground hosting the simulated population.
Grid(int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Creates a new empty grid with the given dimensions and edge-wrapping policy.

H

hashCode() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Returns a hash code consistent with Position.equals(Object), derived from the row and column.

I

INFECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
 
initialize() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.app.MainController
Called by the JavaFX runtime after the FXML view has been loaded and every fx:id-annotated control has been injected.
isDead() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
isInfected() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 
isInside(Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Indicates whether the given position lies inside this grid.
isRunning() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
 
isToricMode() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
 
isVaccinated() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
 

L

load(String) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.io.SaveService
Reads a simulation engine previously written by SaveService.save(com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine, java.lang.String) from the file at filePath.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cellsimulation.app.Main
Standard Java entry point.
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cellsimulation.cli.CliRunner
Entry point of the CLI front-end.
Main - Class in com.cellsimulation.app
JavaFX application entry point of the disease-propagation simulation.
Main() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.app.Main
 
MainController - Class in com.cellsimulation.app
JavaFX controller of the main application window.
MainController() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.app.MainController
 
ManhattanNeighborhood - Class in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Diamond-shaped implementation of NeighborhoodStrategy using the Manhattan (taxicab) distance.
ManhattanNeighborhood(int) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.ManhattanNeighborhood
Creates a new Manhattan neighborhood with the given distance.
MooreNeighborhood - Class in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Eight-neighbors (Moore) implementation of NeighborhoodStrategy.
MooreNeighborhood() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.MooreNeighborhood
 
move(Grid, NeighborhoodStrategy, SimulationSettings) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Optionally relocates this person to a random free neighboring cell.

N

NeighborhoodStrategy - Interface in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Contract for a neighborhood computation strategy (Strategy pattern).

O

onReset() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.app.MainController
Listener callback invoked by the engine when it is reset.
onReset() - Method in interface com.cellsimulation.stats.SimulationListener
Invoked by the simulation engine whenever it is reset to its initial state, so that listeners can clear any accumulated data.
onReset() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.StatisticsService
Clears the accumulated history.
onTick(Grid, int) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.app.MainController
Listener callback invoked by the engine after each tick.
onTick(Grid, int) - Method in interface com.cellsimulation.stats.SimulationListener
Invoked by the simulation engine after each tick has been computed.
onTick(Grid, int) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.stats.StatisticsService
Records a fresh snapshot of the grid for the given tick.
OrthogonalNeighborhood - Class in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Four-neighbors (von Neumann) implementation of NeighborhoodStrategy.
OrthogonalNeighborhood() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.neighborhood.OrthogonalNeighborhood
 

P

pause() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Switches the engine to its "paused" state.
Person - Class in com.cellsimulation.model
An individual living on the simulation grid.
Person(DiseaseState, Position) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Creates a new Person with no individual immunity (immunityFactor == 0.0).
Person(DiseaseState, Position, double) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Creates a new Person with the given initial state, position and immunity factor.
Position - Class in com.cellsimulation.model
Immutable 2D coordinate on the simulation grid.
Position(int, int) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Creates a new position from a row and a column index.

R

RECOVERED - Enum constant in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
 
removeCell(Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Empties the cell at the given position.
removeCell(Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Removes the inhabitant of the given cell, if any.
removeListener(SimulationListener) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Unregisters a previously registered listener.
reset() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Resets the simulation to an empty state.

S

save(SimulationEngine, String) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.io.SaveService
Writes the given simulation engine to the file at filePath using Java binary serialization.
SaveService - Class in com.cellsimulation.io
Persistence service that saves and loads a SimulationEngine to and from a binary file on disk.
SaveService() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.io.SaveService
Creates a new SaveService.
setCell(Position, Person) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Grid
Places (or removes) a person at the given position.
setImmunityFactor(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Sets the individual immunity factor of this person.
setImmunityVariance(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the spread of the truncated-normal distribution used to draw each immunity factor.
setMaxInfectionDays(int) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the maximum infection duration.
setMeanImmunity(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the mean immunity factor used when drawing the immunity of each new person.
setMobilityRate(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the mobility rate.
setMortalityProbability(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the mortality probability.
setNeighborhood(NeighborhoodStrategy) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Replaces the current neighborhood strategy with a new one.
setPosition(Position) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Sets the position of this person on the grid.
setRecoveryProbability(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the recovery probability.
setSimulationSpeed(int) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the simulation speed.
setState(DiseaseState) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Sets the health state of this person.
setTransmissionProbability(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the transmission probability.
setVaccinated(boolean) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Sets the vaccination flag of this person.
setVaccineEfficacy(double) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Sets the vaccine efficacy, i.e. the minimum immunity granted to a vaccinated person.
SimulationEngine - Class in com.cellsimulation.model
Orchestrator of the disease-propagation simulation.
SimulationEngine(Grid, SimulationSettings, NeighborhoodStrategy) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Creates a new simulation engine wired to the given grid, settings and neighborhood strategy.
SimulationListener - Interface in com.cellsimulation.stats
Contract for objects that observe the simulation engine (Observer pattern).
SimulationSettings - Class in com.cellsimulation.model
Centralizes the nine tunable parameters of the simulation.
SimulationSettings() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationSettings
Creates a new SimulationSettings populated with the default values: simulationSpeed = 1 transmissionProbability = 0.30 recoveryProbability = 0.05 mortalityProbability = 0.01 mobilityRate = 0.20 maxInfectionDays = 14 meanImmunity = 0.0 immunityVariance = 0.0 vaccineEfficacy = 0.85
spread(Grid, NeighborhoodStrategy, SimulationSettings) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Spreads the disease to susceptible neighbors using a case-contact model.
start() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Switches the engine to its "running" state.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.app.Main
Builds and shows the primary stage.
Statistics - Class in com.cellsimulation.stats
Immutable snapshot of the population state at a given simulation tick.
Statistics(Grid, int) - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.stats.Statistics
Builds a snapshot of the given grid at the given tick.
StatisticsService - Class in com.cellsimulation.stats
Observer of the simulation engine that records a Statistics snapshot after every tick.
StatisticsService() - Constructor for class com.cellsimulation.stats.StatisticsService
 
step() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.SimulationEngine
Plays a single simulation tick.
SUSCEPTIBLE - Enum constant in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
 

T

toString() - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Position
Returns a human-readable representation of this position, useful for debugging and logging.

U

update(SimulationSettings) - Method in class com.cellsimulation.model.Person
Advances the disease for one tick.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class com.cellsimulation.model.DiseaseState
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
